Operation 'getMapData' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate but description lacks critical details for AI agent usability. Added: (1) explicit list of supported export formats for clarity, (2) parameter requirements (mapCode and format) to explain expected inputs, (3) specific content types for different formats to clarify outputs, (4) authentication requirement for completeness. These additions help AI agents understand exactly what inputs are needed, what outputs to expect, and when this operation can be used.

data.current_summary: Get map data in a specified format
data.current_description: Retrieves map data for a specific map code in the requested export format. SHP format returns a zip file; other formats return their respective content types.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves map data for a specific map code in the requested export format (GeoJSON, KML, CSV, GPX, DXF, or SHP). Requires the mapCode path parameter to identify the target map and the format parameter to specify the desired export format. SHP format returns a zip file containing shapefile components; other formats return their respective content types (e.g., application/json for GeoJSON, application/vnd.google-earth.kml+xml for KML). Requires OAuth 2.0 or Bearer token authentication.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description lacks critical details for AI agent usability.
